claims.text: Tour de l'Uetliberg (TdU) > Personal race strategy and results live in the events table ( propose_race_* / apply_race_* ).
--- ## Race Overview The Tour de l'Uetliberg (TdU) is an annual Strava-segment timed trail race series based on the Uetliberg hill, Zurich.
Not a mass-start race — athletes run each segment independently within a defined time window; Strava auto-records the time.
Results aggregate into an overall TdU ranking.
